name: Crushers Golf Lounge
address: 147 E 2580 S Unit C, St. George, UT 84790
about: Crushers Golf Lounge is a virtual golf experience venue featuring over 400 courses accessible via TrackMan technology. It operates on a pay-to-play and membership model, offering hourly sessions for individuals and groups. The lounge provides a social atmosphere with a focus on both practice and entertainment, featuring a bar and coaching services. Booking is done online through TrackMan's system, with options for group events and private lessons.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to a vast library of over 400 virtual golf courses
Premium TrackMan launch monitor technology for accurate data
Social and relaxed sports bar atmosphere for a complete experience
Availability of professional coaching for skill improvement

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available on-site if you do not have your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Food and drinks are available for purchase at the on-site bar and kitchen.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take?
faq.answer: An 18-hole round typically takes 2-3 hours depending on the pace of play and group size.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Crushers Golf Lounge is a family-friendly venue that welcomes juniors and youth golfers.
